creator: laskavy@Berkeley.Gambit.Msk.SU
text:
The current version of support.html page shows us that different
	countries have different style of administration of majordomo mailing
	lists.

Fix: 

Ask DNS and majordomo admins to do things in the same way.

	I think, that idea of

		<service><maybe, number>.<country>.freebsd.org

	is very good, and we want to implement it in mailing lists too.
How-To-Repeat: 
	$ lynx http://www.freebsd.org/support.html#mailing-list
